## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      3 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 25, 2026 - Jul 18, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _sopnel_, Jul 18, 2026, 1/5: "Sometimes this application not working I open, but no response is like totally frozen stuck"
            2. _Ati7889_, Jun 5, 2026, 1/5: "There are many bugs in the new update. I can’t type anything, and the application is not working at all."
            3. _nicolasmartbg_, May 25, 2026, 1/5: "Liquid Glass redesign may look nicer, however it is functionally INFERIOR; the sidebar gets opened on accident ALL THE TIME, never had that before; worst part of all - you click some other chat by accident and WHAT YOU HAD TYPED IN IN THE TEXTBOX DISAPPEARS!! it’s so incredibly frustrating, the broken gesture system has made me rewrite paragraphs, I hate this update"
